overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a hazy, neon-lit futuristic city. The character crosses streets, passes under highway overpasses with billboards, and explores narrow urban walkways with cyberpunk architecture and street-level commercial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: purple sedan drives past on the street from right to left
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street
reaches opposite sidewalk and continues along the street past pedestrians

agents.ego_description: starts at street corner, crosses the road at the crosswalk, then walks along the sidewalk observing the neon signs

notable_agents.action: purple sedan driving past the intersection
pedestrian in red pants crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: tall building with green facade and multiple neon signs
large cyan neon arrow sign with Japanese characters
tall traffic signal post at the intersection
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
black metal barrier along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a hazy urban intersection with neon-lit buildings. A purple sedan passes by as the character crosses the street at the crosswalk, passing other pedestrians, and continues along the sidewalk lined with metal railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under highway overpass with benches and advertising

events.description: turns right and enters the covered area beneath the highway overpass
passes the large Nicola billboard and tree planter under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing benches and billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward the camera near the billboard

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead creating shade
large white billboard with red Nicola branding
tree growing in a large concrete planter box
yellow painted wooden bench on the sidewalk
tall structure with multiple digital screens showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to walk under a massive highway overpass, entering a shaded corridor with the Nicola billboard visible on the left. The environment features benches, trees in planters, and digital advertising towers while the sky is mostly blocked by the concrete structure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban walkway under overpass with graffiti and debris

events.description: passes a burning trash barrel with visible flames on the left side
turns left to exit the overpass area into a plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk under the overpass, passing urban decay and a burning trash fire

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away under the overpass

entered.detail: metal barrel with open flames burning inside
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
plastic orange barriers blocking off a section of the walkway
tall pole with traffic signs attached

segments.scene_description: Continuing deeper under the overpass where lighting is dimmer, the character passes a burning trash barrel and graffiti-covered walls. The walkway narrows with orange construction barriers visible ahead as the character approaches a turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with outdoor seating transitioning to covered commercial walkway

events.description: exits the overpass into a plaza area with outdoor seating and umbrellas
passes a wall with large red Japanese character graffiti and enters a covered walkway

agents.ego_description: turns into a plaza area, passes outdoor seating, and enters a covered walkway with neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: green umbrellas over outdoor tables and chairs
wall painted with large red Japanese characters
open-air food vendor with green stools and cooking equipment
traditional white paper lanterns hanging from ceiling
overhead covering creating an enclosed commercial corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a plaza with outdoor cafe seating, then enters a covered walkway featuring a wall with bold red Japanese graffiti and a food stall with green stools. Paper lanterns hang overhead as the environment transitions to an enclosed commercial arcade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy, neon-lit urban intersection into the enclosed depths of a commercial arcade. It begins by crossing a street amidst pedestrians and passing neon buildings as a purple sedan glides by, moving along a sidewalk lined with metal railings. As the camera turns right, the open city shifts into a shaded corridor beneath a massive highway overpass, where the sky is obscured by concrete and digital advertising towers like the Nicola billboard emerge. The scene then grows dimmer and more gritty, passing a burning trash barrel and graffiti-covered walls before navigating through orange construction barriers. Finally, the path turns left into a plaza with outdoor cafe seating and transitions into a covered walkway adorned with red Japanese graffiti and hanging paper lanterns.
